headline: Which S&P500 stocks are moving on Tuesday?

headline: SPECTRUM TV APP TO LAUNCH ON AMAZON FIRE TV DEVICES ON APRIL 15
summary: Spectrum and Amazon today announced the Spectrum TV App will launch on Amazon Fire TV devices starting on April 15, expanding the availability of the industry-leading streaming app and giving customers another way to watch live Spectrum TV.

raw.headline: SPECTRUM TV APP TO LAUNCH ON AMAZON FIRE TV DEVICES ON APRIL 15
